label: SOAP
summary: Invokes SOAP web services from a WSDL document and supports deterministic operation discovery for agent workflows.

configuration.code: JSON configuration containing at least a WSDL URL and optionally functionName, auth, and SOAP client options. The WSDL URL must return XML metadata, not an HTML runtime/status page.
configuration.custom_data: Unused by the current SOAP handler implementation.
configuration.agentGuidance: Agents should validate that the WSDL URL returns XML, use describe() to discover the callable operation name, and avoid assuming the SOAP body root element matches functionName.
